name: COB Cannon LP200X

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: BA9F3767-58FC-4580-B902-4AE3B6CDEEBC

comment: Featuring a high output 200-Watt COB (Chip On Board) LED engine, the ADJ COB Cannon LP200X is a potent color mixing wash lighting fixture. Its 5-in-1 light source combines red, green, blue, amber and lime LED chips to allow the creation of a huge gamut of colors with a high CRI, plus a tunable white color temperature between 2300K and 9900K. A compact and versatile fixture, it offers a wide 80-degree native beam angle but is also supplied with both 40-degree and 50-degree lens options. This fixture includes the Aria X2 wireless management system.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

A compact and versatile fixture, it offers a wide 80-degree native beam angle but is also supplied with both 40-degree and 50-degree lens options.
